### Ran Playwright code
```js
await page.evaluate('() => ((async () => { const api = window.__REACT_GRAB__; const els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("h1,a,button")).slice(0,8); const rows = []; for (const el of els) { const source = api ? await api.getSource(el).catch((e)=>({error:String(e && e.message || e)})) : null; const stack = api ? await api.getStackContext(el).catch((e)=>"ERROR:" + String(e && e.message || e)) : ""; rows.push({ tag: el.tagName, text: (el.textContent || "").trim().slice(0,60), source, sourceKeys: source && typeof source === "object" ? Object.keys(source) : [], stack: String(stack).slice(0,300) }); } return { hasReactGrab: !!api, rows }; })())');
```
